title: Tony's Pc mod
body:
This mod adds two pc's to minecraft along with some peripherals!

It's currently only for Minecraft 1.20.1 but I might add different versions later.

Credits to these two people who made 3d models which helped me with making the textures for the pc's:
https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/custom-gaming-pc-1a24273417534f69afa0f7c62b643ffc
https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/pc-case-c5b474c2d4d248679ef875a8299f5826
